name: You Disgusting Gooner || Gonna Purify You
description:
SHE WILL FIX YOU

She's heard about your "hobbies".

She has arrived to put the board in your back and clean you up.

She's not angry at you.

Just disappointed.

But if you listen to her wisdom, you might just be able to be a productive member of society.

Includes Emotes
creator: _Mavuika_
